scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix et-super-agent/backend && npm install --prefix et-super-agent/frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix et-super-agent/backend run dev" "npm --prefix et-super-agent/frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix et-super-agent/backend run build && npm --prefix et-super-agent/frontend run build
